description: User can add a new task via text input field
steps: Create text input element with placeholder
Add submit button next to input
Handle form submission to create task object
Append new task to task array in memory
Clear input field after submission
Re-render task list

description: Display all tasks in a scrollable list with text and status
steps: Create task list container element
Render each task as a list item with text content
Show completion status visually (checkbox or strikethrough)
Update list on any data change

description: User can toggle a task between active and completed states
steps: Add checkbox or clickable element per task
Toggle completed boolean on click
Apply visual distinction (strikethrough, muted color) for completed tasks
Persist updated state

description: User can delete a task permanently from the list
steps: Add delete button per task item
Remove task from array on click
Re-render task list
Persist updated state

description: Tasks persist in localStorage across page reloads
steps: Save task array to localStorage as JSON on every mutation
Load tasks from localStorage on page load
Handle missing or corrupt localStorage data gracefully

description: Each task receives a unique ID for reliable identification
steps: Generate unique ID using Date.now() or crypto.randomUUID()
Assign ID at task creation time
Use ID for all task lookup, update, and delete operations

description: Prevent adding empty or whitespace-only tasks
steps: Trim input value before processing
Reject empty strings silently or with visual hint
Keep focus on input field after rejection

description: Show a friendly message when no tasks exist
steps: Detect when task array is empty
Display placeholder message (e.g. 'No tasks yet')
Hide placeholder when tasks are added

description: Single-page layout with centered card containing input and task list
steps: Create semantic HTML structure (header, main, footer)
Center content with max-width container
Style as a clean card with padding and subtle shadow
Add app title/heading

description: Pressing Enter in the input field adds the task
steps: Listen for keydown event on input
Trigger add-task on Enter key
Prevent default form submission behavior

description: Filter task list by All, Active, or Completed status
steps: Add filter buttons (All / Active / Completed)
Track current filter state
Filter displayed tasks based on selected filter
Highlight active filter button

description: Display count of remaining active tasks
steps: Calculate number of incomplete tasks
Display count in footer area (e.g. '3 items left')
Update count on every task change

description: Button to remove all completed tasks at once
steps: Add 'Clear completed' button in footer area
Filter out all tasks with completed=true
Re-render and persist updated list
Hide button when no completed tasks exist

description: Double-click a task to edit its text inline
steps: Detect double-click on task text
Replace text with editable input field
Save on Enter or blur
Cancel on Escape, restoring original text
Persist updated text

description: Responsive layout that works well on mobile, tablet, and desktop
steps: Add viewport meta tag
Use fluid widths and relative units
Add media queries for small screens
Ensure touch-friendly tap targets (min 44px)

description: Reorder tasks via drag and drop
steps: Add draggable attribute to task items
Implement dragstart, dragover, drop event handlers
Visual feedback during drag (placeholder, opacity change)
Update task array order and persist

description: Export tasks as JSON file and import from JSON file
steps: Add export button that triggers JSON file download
Add import button with file input
Validate imported JSON structure
Merge or replace current tasks on import
Persist imported data

description: Show creation date for each task
steps: Add createdAt field to task data model
Record timestamp at task creation
Display relative or absolute date below task text
Update localStorage schema

description: Toggle all tasks between complete and active with one click
steps: Add toggle-all checkbox above task list
If any tasks are active, mark all as completed
If all tasks are completed, mark all as active
Update visual state and persist

description: Toggle between light and dark color themes
steps: Define CSS custom properties for light and dark themes
Add theme toggle button in header
Apply dark class to body and restyle all elements
Persist theme preference in localStorage
Respect prefers-color-scheme media query as default

description: Smooth CSS transitions for adding, completing, and deleting tasks
steps: Add fade-in animation for new tasks
Add strikethrough transition for completing tasks
Add fade-out or slide-out animation for deleted tasks
Use CSS transitions and keyframes only (no JS animation libraries)

description: Full keyboard navigation and ARIA attributes for screen readers
steps: Add ARIA roles and labels to interactive elements
Ensure all actions are keyboard-accessible (Tab, Enter, Space, Escape)
Add focus-visible styles for keyboard navigation
Use semantic HTML elements (button, input, ul/li)
Announce dynamic changes with aria-live regions

description: Custom favicon and dynamic page title showing task count
steps: Create simple SVG or emoji favicon
Link favicon in HTML head
Update document.title to show active task count (e.g. '(3) TodoApp')
Update title on every task change

description: Subtle hover and focus effects on all interactive elements
steps: Add hover styles to buttons (opacity, color shift)
Add hover reveal for delete button (hidden until hover)
Add focus ring styles for input fields
Ensure transitions are smooth (150-200ms)

description: Print-friendly stylesheet for printing the task list
steps: Add @media print CSS rules
Hide interactive elements (buttons, input field)
Show clean task list with checkboxes
Remove shadows, backgrounds, and decorative elements
